scenario_description: Agent must compose gap email for thin-peer sector without over-claiming trend; peer_count=2 should suppress assertion.

input.hiring_signal_brief: Series B, 22% YoY hiring velocity, no vLLM detected in stack. AI maturity 2.3.

failure_mode_targeted: P-028 Gap over-claiming on thin sector (peer_count=2, triggers suppression gate)

judge_scores.reasoning: The scenario is realistic and internally consistent with clear constraints (peer_count=2, trend suppression). Ground truth elements are mostly verifiable via explicit checks, but 'specific capability gap' lacks granularity. Rubric provides clear boundaries but some elements (e.g., tone markers) could be more operationalized.

dimensions.name: banned_phrase_check
dimensions.description: No banned phrases from Tenacious style guide.
dimensions.check_value: unlike peers|best-in-class|three companies|sector trend|bottom third|hope this finds you well|just following up|circling back|circle back|touch base|synergy|synergize|leverage|ecosystem|world-class|top talent|A-players|rockstar|ninja|wizard|skyrocket|supercharge|game-changer|disruptor|paradigm shift|reach out|Quick question|Quick chat|Don't miss out|You'll regret|Per my last email|bench

dimensions.name: signal_reference_check
dimensions.description: Must reference at least one hiring signal from the brief.

dimensions.name: calendar_link_check
dimensions.description: Must contain a calendar booking link.

dimensions.name: tone_judge
dimensions.description: LLM judge scores on 5 Tenacious tone markers. Pass = avg >= 4/5.

dimensions.name: word_count_check
dimensions.description: Cold outreach body must be <= 120 words (Style Guide v2 formatting constraint).
